# errorDomain

**Type Property**

The domain of the error.

## Declaration

```swift
static var errorDomain: String { get }
```

## Discussion

The domain for errors related to mail composition.

## Errors

- **saveFailed**: An error occurred while trying to save the email message to the drafts folder.
- **sendFailed**: An error occurred while trying to queue or send the email message.
- **MFMailComposeError.Code**: Error codes for [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSError] objects that are associated with the mail composition interface.
